CustomField.description: The Global Policy on Engaging HCPs as Consultants, Advisory Board Members and External Speakers has been followed, if the proposed event involves the engagement of an HCP(s) (e.g., as a speaker)?
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Global Policy on Engaging HCPs as Consultants, Advisory Board Members and External Speakers has been followed, if the proposed event involves the engagement of an HCP(s) (e.g., as a speaker)?
CustomField.label: Is Global Policy on Engaging OLD
